steps.title: Find the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage says research "suffered from a myopic focus on a few countries" despite stated claims of the blank. The word "despite" tells you the blank is the opposite of narrow or limited — researchers claimed their work was something it was not. Look for a word meaning thorough or complete coverage.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Test each choice against "a myopic focus on a few countries":
  • Choice A — 'novelty': means newness or originality — the passage criticizes geographic scope, not originality, so this creates no logical contrast. ✗
  • Choice B — 'immutability': means unchanging quality — researchers do not typically claim their dataset is immutable, and this does not contrast with a narrow geographic focus. ✗
  • Choice C — 'exhaustiveness': means complete, thorough coverage — claiming exhaustiveness directly conflicts with "myopic focus on a few countries," making the "despite" contrast logically tight. ✓
  • Choice D — 'pervasiveness': means widespread presence of a phenomenon, not thoroughness of a study's coverage — it describes how broadly something exists, not how comprehensively a study covers it. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
